title: Path Core Deck
summary: Compacted the immediate Path Map stack by moving Mission Scan, Route Command, and Route Rail into SCAN/COMMAND/ROUTE tabs with one selected panel mounted at a time.
verification: python -m pytest E:\agent-company-lab\tests\test_agent_company_atlas_path_core_deck.py -q failed before implementation on missing pathCoreDeckViewByLane.

Browser runtime: default Core Deck mounted only Mission Scan; coordinate click on ROUTE switched active panel to route, unmounted Mission Scan and Command Strip, mounted one Route Rail, and kept overflow at 0.

Browser viewport override did not apply in this session: fresh and selected tabs still reported 1280px width. Mobile compactness is covered by CSS contract assertions for horizontal tabs and overflow-safe scroll behavior.
